title: Cloud Platform Architecture over Virtualized Datacenters
description: A layered view showing the abstraction from physical hardware to cloud services, highlighting security integration at each level.
elements: Cloud Management & Orchestration Layer (APIs, Schedulers, Automation)
relationships: Physical Layer hosts the Virtualization Layer
Virtualization Layer is managed by the Cloud Management Layer
Cloud Management Layer provisions and delivers the Cloud Service Layer
Security is integrated throughout all layers (e.g., Hardware Security, Hypervisor Security, API Security, Tenant Isolation)
